filled_slots.fix_scope: Vendor Directory should correctly link VARs to vendors and reliably surface extracted risk scoring so users can see it
filled_slots.data_source: Vendor Assessment Report data already exposed through backend var_reports and vendor detail endpoints

assumptions: User wants direct remediation work on Vendor Directory Risk & Scores rather than continued UX-only review.
Missing MEMORY/PROJECT_BRIEF/CONSTRAINTS/TOOL_CATALOG/DECISIONS/EVAL_HISTORY files do not block best-effort execution.
The strongest safe fix is to make the modal pull and derive Risk & Scores from latest available VAR report data when vendor detail payload is incomplete.
approval_points: Pause before presenting any final roadmap or launch-scope recommendation to others
open_questions: Whether the vendor detail endpoint is always returning populated var_scores for vendors with linked VARs.
Which linked VARs are still attached to the wrong vendor or missing score extraction.
Whether the Risk & Scores tab should fall back to vendor var-report data when the hydrated vendor payload is incomplete.
Whether the current modal experience needs a loading state for Risk & Scores while VAR data is being resolved.
Whether local dev/HMR behavior is interrupting modal-state runtime validation of the Risk & Scores fix.
Why Backstreet Surveillance currently resolves to pending/no extracted weighted VAR score despite being marked VAR Linked.
Whether the new Score Extraction Pending callout is visible only within the Risk & Scores tab body and still needs viewport confirmation.
Which 15 scored VARs are correctly linked today and which high-value vendors remain linked but unscored.
